title: cyperus bifidus
intro: Cyperus bifidus is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the forked flatsedge. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus bifidus include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are typically made from the leaves and roots of the plant.
